content.en:
In the next few years, Ye Tian will not go to the extradimensional storm to take risks, and it will be difficult to encounter this situation again.

Moreover, he has been exploring like this, and there is also a risk, if he encounters an extra-dimensional realm, the strange blood pupil will not be able to find the other party in advance, maybe he will be killed by the other party, and then he will lose the strange blood pupil, a high-level extra-dimensional thing.

Therefore, he is ready to avoid entering the extradimensional storm for the time being.

"Next, I will go all out to comprehend the power of the superdimension, and comprehend the power of the superdimension as soon as possible, so that we can deal with the ~ threat of the ice ghost organization!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

The core of the seals.

Ye Tian stayed with one of the arms of the super-dimensional elve, and urged the strange blood pupil technique to dissect the extra-dimensional patterns contained in this arm, and to comprehend the real extra-dimensional power little by little.

Rumble!!!

Countless extra-dimensional mystical aura poured into his will, and he dissected and comprehended it little by little.

The effect of this kind of contemplation is far greater than any previous one, and the extradimensional epiphany is far inferior to this arm.

But Ye Tian found that the extra-dimensional power on the arm of the super-dimensional elf was also dissipating, although it was very slow, it would definitely be exhausted in the future.

"The true extradimensional power must be comprehended before the extradimensional power on the extradimensional elf's arm is exhausted!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And just like that, the days passed slowly.

If there were no weird blood pupils, Ye Tian really wouldn't be sure to comprehend the true superdimensional power by relying on one arm of the superdimensional elf.

But now, he's pretty sure.

In just one hundred trillion years of comprehension, he has made unimaginable progress, and he is only one step away from comprehending the power of the extradimensional dimension.

"At most, fifty trillion solstice eras, I will comprehend!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Sure enough.

After he comprehended the forty-six trillion years of the Dao Era, he completely comprehended the superdimensional power of heaven and earth.

Rumble!!!!!

Wisps of extradimensional power merged into his body, which was the real extradimensional power.

Under this extradimensional power, Ye Tian's body began to transform, and the extradimensional assimilation of the body by the extradimensional things in the past was all suppressed or disintegrated.

Of course.

Extra-dimensional things such as the Jialan Stone Disk and the Strange Blood Pupil, even if they comprehend the true extradimensional power, they can't solve the side effects.

This is also the reason why the half-step extradimensional realm does not dare to fuse the weird blood pupil and the garan stone plate.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian used the power of the Eternal Dao to refine those Transcendental Resources to refine his Eternal Dao Seeds, and the refining effect of the Eternal Dao Seeds was increased by more than ten times.

This is still that he doesn't know how to use the power of the super dimension, if he uses the power of the super dimension to create a super dimensional technique that can directly refine the eternal Dao species, then the cultivation speed will be faster.

So in the following days, Ye Tian used the Jialan stone plate to deduce and create such an extradimensional technique.

Sure enough, it didn't take long for Ye Tian to successfully create it.

This extra-dimensional technique was named by him as the extra-dimensional alchemy technique!

Although the name is simple, it has a really big effect!

Rumble!!!!

Under the power of the super dimension, Ye Tian's eternal Dao seed was frantically refined, and he didn't have to worry about the impact of the super dimensional assimilation, after all, he had already controlled the power of the super dimension, and the power of the super dimension was already endless and would not be exhausted.

At this time, his cultivation speed had increased by more than a hundredfold.

In addition, after mastering the power of the extra-dimensional, the various extra-dimensional techniques he created in the past can be performed by each copy body without the help of extradimensional objects.

However, he also found that if there is an extradimensional thing, the effect of the corresponding extradimensional technique will increase a lot.

Of course.

The extra-dimensional techniques corresponding to extra-dimensional things such as the Ga Lan Stone Plate and the Strange Blood Pupil cannot be performed without the help of extra-dimensional things.

For example, the Strange Blood Pupil Technique must use the Strange Blood Pupil.

Subsequently, Ye Tian tested how many extradimensional things he could fuse.

Strange blood pupils fused.

Kunjie Wood Fragments Fusion!

One by one, extra-dimensional things were fused by him, and it was not until ten extra-dimensional things were fused that the fusion reached the limit.

Of course.

Now for him, except for the weird blood pupil and the Jialan stone plate, other extra-dimensional things have little effect, even if they are high-level extra-dimensional things, they don't have much effect, and the increase in strength is too small.

"According to the current increase in strength, it won't be long before I can condense the twelfth perfect eternal realm spirit!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The years passed.

Ye Tian continued to cultivate, and took out various resources to assist in improving the Eternal Dao Species.

Gradually, the 10 million years of the Dao Era passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed has been raised to its current limit.

He then began to condense the Twelfth Eternal Realm Spirit.

This time, he didn't use any auxiliary resources, because he could break through 100% with the power of the extradimensional power.

"Cohesion!"

The twelfth Eternal Realm Spirit was easily condensed under the control of the extradimensional power.

The Eternal Dao Seed is beginning to transform, the physical body is also increasing, and the power of the Realm God is also skyrocketing.

After a long time, the transformation was over, and he was already a peak realm god who had condensed twelve eternal realm spirits.

The normal peak realm god, after condensing the twelve eternal realm spirits, began to comprehend the power of the transcendent dimension, and once he comprehended it, he would impact the half-step transcendent realm.

Of course.

If you comprehend the power of the extra-dimensional, it is impossible to impact the half-step super-dimensional realm like this.

If Ye Tian was willing, he would indeed be able to become a half-step transcendent realm in a short period of time, but he still wanted to condense the thirteenth Eternal Realm Spirit, or even the fourteenth Eternal Realm Spirit.

In this way, the stronger his foundation will be, and the stronger his strength will be.

But.

Ye Tian also had to prepare the super-dimensional Dao seed inheritance for himself, he had previously purchased several high-level super-dimensional Dao inheritances and a bunch of ordinary super-dimensional Dao inheritances, but he couldn't look down on them at the moment.

He wanted to create the perfect extradimensional Dao inheritance.

"I can only use the Garan Stone Plate!"

Ye Tian began to deduce, using the Jialan Stone Disk to delay the inheritance of the superdimensional Dao species.

And his other copied bodies are still improving their cultivation and refining the Eternal Dao Species, and the two do not affect it.

At the same time, Ye Tian also sent a replica body into the extradimensional storm.

His strength now far surpasses the past, even if it is a blood shadow puppet, he is far from his opponent, although he can't fight through the half-step extradimensional realm, but with the help of the strange blood pupil, he can spy farther away, and escape when he encounters a half-step extradimensional realm.

In short, after comprehending the power of the extradimensional, it is very easy for him to walk in the extradimensional storm, and he can get more good things.

And just like that, the days passed.

In the blink of an eye, 300 billion years have passed since the age of the Dao.
